stageReviews.notes: All 11 CONTEXT.json decisions implemented across 3 plans. 1 minor warning: FlowResult in __all__ without import.

findings.message: FlowResult listed in __all__ but module-level import was removed during lazy-import refactor. 'from scripts.context import FlowResult' would raise ImportError. No current consumers found — low risk, follow-up fix.

evidence: All 9 plan tasks verified via py_compile + grep assertions
All planVerify commands passed for Plans 01, 02, 03
No _require_conn() calls remain in phases/ (grep: 0 matches)
No storage.get_node() N+1 patterns remain in impact.py or community.py

stageReviews.notes: Clean implementation. Security fix (parameterized queries), encapsulation (no private access from phases), performance (N+1 eliminated), HybridSearch wired with robust fallback.
evidence: SQL injection fixed: exports.py f-string -> $fp parameterized query
SQL injection fixed: storage.py f-string type list -> $t0,$t1 parameterized
community.py/coupling.py f-string type lists replaced by storage methods using parameterized queries
Lazy import pattern correctly breaks kuzu cascade; model import verified without kuzu
HybridSearch _get_hybrid_search() uses sentinel pattern (None/False) for clean lazy init
Broad except in _get_hybrid_search() is intentional — graceful degradation to CONTAINS fallback
_utils.py is_entry_point() is superset of both prior implementations (adds is_exported check)

securityFindings.message: get_all_relationships_by_types() now uses parameterized $t0...$tN instead of f-string interpolation
File path no longer interpolated via f-string; uses storage.get_symbol_nodes_by_file($fp)

performanceFindings.message: Eliminated 2 N+1 get_node() patterns (BFS loop + results loop) via pre-fetch dict cache
Eliminated N+1 _query_node_name() per community member via batch name_lookup dict
HybridSearch (BM25+fuzzy+semantic RRF) wired into search() with lazy init and CONTAINS fallback

patternCompliance.notes: GraphStorage and all phase imports lazy inside methods
No _require_conn() in phases; all use public storage API
is_entry_point() extracted to _utils.py, used by dead_code.py and flows.py

principleNotes: Surgical Changes: Each plan touched only declared file scope
Simplicity First: Pre-fetch dicts are minimal O(1) lookup replacements for N+1
Goal-Driven Execution: All 11 findings from source review addressed
warnings: FlowResult in __all__ without import (no consumers, low risk)

score.notes: testCoverage=1: py_compile + grep assertions verify correctness but no unit tests (kuzu not available in dev env)
